name: Soccer Standings
description: Shows European soccer league standings with optional favorite-team focus, crests, and a markdown note.

configVariants.headline: Bundesliga
configVariants.markdown:
**Focus:** Bayern window

- Form and goal difference at a glance
- Live data when an API key is configured

configVariants.headline: Premier League
configVariants.markdown:
### Matchday note
Rotate focus teams from the settings page.

apiKey.title: football-data.org API key
apiKey.description: Optional. Leave blank to use FOOTBALL_DATA_API_KEY from .env or sample standings.

focusTeam.title: Focus team
focusTeam.description: Optional team name, short name, or TLA. The table centers around this team when possible.

maxTeams.title: Maximum teams
maxTeams.description: Use 0 to show the full table.

markdown.title: Markdown note
markdown.description: Optional markdown shown beside or below the table. Supports headings, bold, italic, code, links, blockquotes, and lists.

markdownUrl.title: Remote markdown URL
markdownUrl.description: Optional HTTP(S) URL to a raw markdown file. When set, this content is shown instead of the inline markdown note.
